description: Eqivo is an open source telephony and real-time communications API platform built on top of FreeSWITCH. It is designed to sit between FreeSWITCH and an application, exposing REST controls and invoking application webhooks for call handling.
summary: eqivo.org documents one self-hosted HTTP REST API surface, the Eqivo REST API, authenticated with HTTP Basic auth using configured `restAuthId` and `restAuthToken`; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface was found on the domain.
